name: Proof of Reserves
postStartCommand: npm install --silent && node scripts/server.js > /tmp/server.log 2>&1 & echo 'Server starting at http://localhost:8080 — logs at /tmp/server.log'

DEPLOYER_SECRET.description: Stellar testnet deployer secret key (starts with S)

CONTRACT_ID.description: Deployed Soroban contract ID (starts with C)
